root.sql: select pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as membername , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , trim(sc_mem_m_member_address.address_no ||' '||decode(sc_mem_m_member_address.mooban , null , null ,'หมู่บ้าน'||trim(sc_mem_m_member_address.mooban)) ||' '|| decode(sc_mem_m_member_address.moo , null , null ,trim(sc_mem_m_member_address.moo)) ||' '||decode(sc_mem_m_member_address.soi , null , null ,'ซอย'||trim(sc_mem_m_member_address.soi)))as line_1 , decode(sc_mem_m_member_address.road , null , null ,'ถนน'||trim(sc_mem_m_member_address.road))||' '|| decode(sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol , null , null ,decode(sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code , '010' , 'แขวง'||trim(PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_sub_district_name (sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol)) , 'ตำบล'||trim(PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_sub_district_name (sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol))))as line_2 , decode(sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code , null , null ,decode(sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code , '010' , 'เขต'||trim(PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_district_name(sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code,sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code)) , 'อำเภอ'||trim(PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_district_name(sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code,sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code)))||' '|| decode(sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code , null , null ,(decode(sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code , '010' , trim(PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_province_name(sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code)),'จังหวัด'||trim(PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_province_name(sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code))))) ||' '||trim(sc_mem_m_member_address.postcode)) as line_3 from sc_mem_m_member_address , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control = '042' and sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no = '!mem_1!' and sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control = '042' and sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '0' or sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no = '!mem_2!' and sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control = '042' and sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '0' or sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no = '!mem_3!' and sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control = '042' and sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '0' or sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no = '!mem_4!' and sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control = '042' and sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '0' or sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no = '!mem_5!' and sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control = '042' and sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '0' or sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no = '!mem_6!' and sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control = '042' and sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '0' or sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no = '!mem_7!' and sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control = '042' and sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '0' or sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no = '!mem_8!' and sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control = '042' and sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '0' or sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no = '!mem_9!' and sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control = '042' and sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '0' or sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no = '!mem_10!' and sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control = '042' and sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '0' /*WHERE*/ order by '!mem_1!','!mem_2!','!mem_3!','!mem_4!','!mem_5!','!mem_6!','!mem_7!','!mem_8!','!mem_9!','!mem_10!'
